title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with real-time inventory, payment processing, and admin dashboard.
longDescription:
## Overview

A comprehensive e-commerce solution built from the ground up. Features include real-time inventory management, Stripe payment integration, and a full admin dashboard for managing products, orders, and analytics.

## Key Features

- **Real-time Inventory**: WebSocket-based inventory updates across all connected clients
- **Payment Processing**: Secure Stripe integration with webhook handling
- **Admin Dashboard**: Full CRUD operations with role-based access control
- **Search & Filters**: Elasticsearch-powered product search with faceted filtering
- **Performance**: Server-side rendering with Next.js for optimal SEO and load times

## Architecture

The application follows a microservices architecture with separate services for auth, products, orders, and payments. All services communicate via a message queue (RabbitMQ) for eventual consistency.

title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
description: Interactive analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization, custom widgets, and automated reporting.
longDescription:
## Overview

A real-time analytics dashboard built for monitoring business KPIs and metrics. Features drag-and-drop widget customization, automated PDF report generation, and WebSocket-powered live data updates.

## Key Features

- **Live Data**: WebSocket connections for real-time metric updates
- **Custom Dashboards**: Drag-and-drop widget placement and sizing
- **Automated Reports**: Scheduled PDF generation and email delivery
- **Data Export**: CSV/Excel export with custom date ranges
- **Mobile Responsive**: Full functionality on mobile devices

title: Mobile Fitness Tracker
description: Cross-platform mobile app for tracking workouts, nutrition, and health metrics with AI-powered recommendations.
longDescription:
## Overview

A cross-platform fitness tracking application built with React Native. Integrates with health APIs (Apple Health, Google Fit) and uses machine learning for personalized workout recommendations.

## Key Features

- **Workout Tracking**: Log exercises with sets, reps, and weights
- **Nutrition Logging**: Barcode scanner and food database integration
- **AI Recommendations**: ML-powered workout suggestions based on progress
- **Social Features**: Share achievements and compete with friends
- **Offline Support**: Full functionality without internet connection

title: Infrastructure as Code Pipeline
description: Automated CI/CD pipeline with Terraform, Kubernetes orchestration, and multi-cloud deployment support.
longDescription:
## Overview

A complete Infrastructure as Code solution for automating cloud deployments. Supports multi-cloud environments (AWS, GCP) with Terraform modules and Kubernetes Helm charts.

## Key Features

- **Multi-Cloud**: Deploy to AWS and GCP with the same configuration
- **GitOps Workflow**: Infrastructure changes through pull requests
- **Auto-Scaling**: Kubernetes HPA and cluster autoscaler configuration
- **Monitoring**: Prometheus + Grafana dashboards for infrastructure metrics
- **Security**: Automated security scanning and compliance checks

title: AI Document Analyzer
description: ML-powered document processing system with OCR, NLP classification, and automated data extraction.
longDescription:
## Overview

An intelligent document processing system that uses OCR and NLP to automatically classify, extract, and organize information from various document types (invoices, contracts, forms).

## Key Features

- **OCR Processing**: Extract text from scanned documents and images
- **Document Classification**: Automatically categorize documents by type
- **Data Extraction**: Pull structured data from unstructured documents
- **API Integration**: RESTful API for integration with existing systems
- **Batch Processing**: Handle bulk document uploads efficiently
